content.speakerText: I saw you published a paper in the Journal of Environmental Science. Can you tell me what your main contribution was?
content.speakerTextCn: 我看到你在《环境科学期刊》发表过论文，能说说你的主要贡献吗？
expectedAnswers: I designed a machine learning algorithm to track microplastic flow patterns, which reduced error rates by 18%.
I was the second author—I collected field samples and ran statistical tests using R. It taught me how to handle messy real-world data.
I contributed to the methodology section and helped validate the model with field data.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了个人在研究中的具体角色
语言准确性：语法正确，动词使用恰当（如 designed, collected, validated）
表达自然度：符合学术口语习惯，避免空泛词汇（如 'helped a lot'）
关键词覆盖：使用了至少一个学术关键词（algorithm, statistical tests, methodology, field data）

content.speakerText: What was the biggest challenge you faced during your research, and how'd you overcome it?
content.speakerTextCn: 研究中你遇到的最大挑战是什么？怎么解决的？
expectedAnswers: I struggled with inconsistent sensor readings, so I calibrated the equipment daily and cross-checked with a colleague’s setup—this led to a more robust protocol.
At first, I didn’t understand the statistical method, so I took an online course and met weekly with my supervisor for three weeks until I mastered it.
The funding ran out mid-project, so I applied for a small grant and reprioritized experiments to focus on the most critical variables.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确描述挑战与具体应对行动
语言准确性：正确使用过去时态和连接词（so, until, so that）
表达自然度：语句流畅，体现反思与成长，避免简单说 'I tried harder'
关键词覆盖：使用了至少两个学术相关词（calibrated, protocol, statistical method, grant, variables）
